title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: When a God turns into a Goblin.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a goblins deck, featuring Purphoros, God of the Forge as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro
01:18 - Deck Tech
07:29 - vs Minsc & Boo, Timeless Heroes
12:10 - vs Nissa, Resurgent Animist
16:59 - vs Kellan, Planar Trailblazer
22:59 - vs The Jolly Balloon Man
27:17 - vs Davriel, Soul Broker
31:29 - vs General Kreat, the Boltbringer
35:20 - vs Azusa, Lost but Seeking
39:41 - vs Djeru and Hazoret
47:19 - vs Yorion, Sky Nomad
48:31 - vs Tasigur, the Golden Fang

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/purphoros-goblins-brawl
